div.div: Yarn: How to upgrade yarn version using terminal?

Not remembering how i've installed yarn the command that worked for me was: yarn policies set-version This command updates the current yarn version to the latest stable. From the documentation: Note that this command also is the preferred way to upgrade Yarn - it will work no matter how you originally installed it, which might sometimes prove difficult to figure out otherwise. Reference
How to make Instagram "Open in app" button?
